title: Custom Painters
description: Drawing custom shapes and graphics with CustomPaint.

slides.title: CustomPaint and Canvas 🎨
slides.content:
# Custom Painters

`CustomPaint` allows you to draw anything using a `Canvas`.

* Provide a `CustomPainter` subclass.
* Override `paint(Canvas canvas, Size size)` and `shouldRepaint`.
* Use `Paint` objects to define style (color, stroke, etc.).
* Great for charts, signatures, custom shapes.

quizData.question: Which method of CustomPainter actually performs the drawing?
quizData.explanation: The paint method receives the Canvas to draw on.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `shouldRepaint` wisely

Return true only if the painter's configuration changed, to avoid unnecessary repaints.
